narrative:
Hocking County has 17,531 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.1% of registrants.
